figures.caption: TABLE I: Comparison with previous methods on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet-1.3 Datasets.
Fig. 2: Qualitative results of our proposed method and previous method on THUMOS14 Dataset for Video Action Detection task.

Fig. 1: The architecture of the proposed TAD framework. We integrate ESTF Adapters into the frozen pre-trained backbone layers to adapt representations for temporal action detection. For each adapter, features are processed by two branches: (1) The Spatial Branch that extracts localized structural cues using convolutions, and (2) The Temporal Branch that employs the TB-SSM to capture asymmetric state dynamics for precise boundary regression. Finally, fused features are fed into the detection head.
